devdoc.details: Marketplace for buying and selling AI Agent NFTs

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

adminClearListing(address,uint256).details: Admin function to clear orphaned listings (e.g., from old NFT contracts) Only owner can call this

getTopSellersBySalesCount(uint256).details: Get top sellers by number of sales

params.limit: Maximum number of sellers to return

returns.sellers: Array of seller addresses (sorted by sales count, descending)

getTopSellersByVolume(uint256).details: Get top sellers by sales volume

params.limit: Maximum number of sellers to return

returns.sellers: Array of seller addresses (sorted by volume, descending)
returns.volumes: Array of corresponding sales volumes in wei

getTotalSellersCount().details: Get total number of unique sellers

isListed(address,uint256).details: Check if an agent is listed

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: AgentMarketplace
